content.text:
Based on the visual inspection of the molecule, I can now confidently identify the neighbor atoms of atom index 40 (carbon):

- C:41 (carbon with index 41)
- H:53 (hydrogen with index 53)
- H:54 (hydrogen with index 54)

The geomconf_index for this molecule is 4209, as indicated by the filename "geomconf_4209.xyz".

Therefore, the neighbor atoms of atom 40 are:

- Atom index 41, element C
- Atom index 53, element H
- Atom index 54, element H

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 40, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
